# Load the provided databases and search for the span
import json, re, unicodedata
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

# Collect texts
quran_texts = [rec.get("ayah_text","") for rec in quran]
hadith_texts = []
for rec in hadith:
    if "hadithTxt" in rec and rec["hadithTxt"]:
        hadith_texts.append(rec["hadithTxt"])
    if "Matn" in rec and rec["Matn"]:
        hadith_texts.append(rec["Matn"])

orig_full = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"

# Normalization utilities
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]")
tatweel = "\u0640"
punc_table = str.maketrans({c:" " for c in "[](){}:;,.!؟?،ـ«»'\"`~@#$%^&*_+=|/\\<>-"})

def norm(s):
    s = s.replace(tatweel, "")
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub("", s)
    s = s.translate(punc_table)
    # Unify hamza forms to bare alif where reasonable
    s = s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا").replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ى","ي")
    # normalize ta marbuta? keep it; or map ة to ه? Usually keep as is; we map to ه for recall then compare both ways
    s = s.replace("ة","ه")
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r"\s+"," ", s).strip().lower()
    return s

orig_full_n = norm(orig_full)

# Search exact substring and approximate matches
def best_matches(corpus_texts, topn=5):
    candidates = []
    for t in corpus_texts:
        t_n = norm(t)
        # substring check
        sub = orig_full_n in t_n or t_n in orig_full_n
        # token overlap
        a_tokens = set(orig_full_n.split())
        b_tokens = set(t_n.split())
        inter = a_tokens & b_tokens
        prec = len(inter)/len(a_tokens) if a_tokens else 0
        rec = len(inter)/len(b_tokens) if b_tokens else 0
        f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec) if (prec+rec)>0 else 0
        # sequence matcher
        ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, orig_full_n, t_n).ratio()
        score = max(f1, ratio)
        if sub or score > 0.5:  # collect moderately similar
            candidates.append((score, t))
    candidates.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return candidates[:topn]

quran_best = best_matches(quran_texts, topn=10)
hadith_best = best_matches(hadith_texts, topn=10)

quran_best, hadith_best[:5], orig_full, orig_full_n

# Targeted searches for hypotheses
import re

def find_contains(pattern, texts, n=20):
    res = []
    for t in texts:
        if re.search(pattern, t):
            res.append(t)
            if len(res)>=n:
                break
    return res

samples_manna = find_contains("وَلَقَدْ مَنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ", quran_texts, n=50)
samples_manna_hadith = find_contains("وَلَقَدْ مَنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ", hadith_texts, n=50)
samples_shukr_q = find_contains("الشُّكْرِ", quran_texts, n=50)
samples_shukr_h = find_contains("الشُّكْرِ", hadith_texts, n=50)
samples_fi_l = find_contains("فِعْلَ", quran_texts, n=50)
samples_fi_l_h = find_contains("فِعْلَ", hadith_texts, n=50)

(len(samples_manna), samples_manna[:5],
 len(samples_shukr_q), samples_shukr_q[:5],
 len(samples_fi_l), samples_fi_l[:5])

# Search hadiths for occurrences of "الشكر" and "فعل الشكر" and "فعل"
matches_shukr = [t for t in hadith_texts if "الشكر" in t]
matches_fi3l_shukr = [t for t in hadith_texts if "فعل الشكر" in t or "فِعْلَ الشُّكْرِ" in t]
matches_fi3l = [t for t in hadith_texts if "فِعْلَ" in t or "فعل " in t]

len(matches_shukr), matches_fi3l_shukr[:5], len(matches_fi3l)
[m for m in quran_texts if "مَنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ" in m or "مَنَّ عَلَيْنَا رَبُّنَا" in m or "من عليكم ربكم" in m]

# Search for words starting with "وَعَدَدَ" or containing "عدد"
matches_wa3adda_q = [t for t in quran_texts if "وَعَدَدَ" in t or "وعَدَدَ" in t or "عدد" in t]
len(matches_wa3adda_q), matches_wa3adda_q[:20]

# Search for "عِدَّةُ" occurrences
[m for m in quran_texts if "عِدَّةُ" in m or "أَعَدَّ" in m or "وَأَعَدَّ" in m][:20]
[v for v in quran_texts if "فِعْلَ" in v or "فعل " in v][:50]
[v for v in quran_texts if "شُكْر" in v or "شَكَرْ" in v or "اشكر" in v or "شَكُور" in v][:50]
